name: ai-product-factory
description: Governed product discovery, design planning, delivery review, and release orchestration.

interface.shortDescription: Turn product ideas into governed delivery artifacts.
interface.longDescription: A four-skill product delivery system with adaptive discovery depth, explicit approvals, resumable state, Claude Code implementation handoffs, and deterministic quality gates.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use $ai-product-factory to inspect this repository and continue from the first incomplete governed phase.
